query: Poll 7 agents on these options and give me the consensus ranking.
Use stochastic consensus to see what 10 agents think about choosing Postgres, SQLite, or D1 for a small internal tool.
Spawn 5 agents to independently analyze whether we should ship this change behind a feature flag this week or delay two weeks for more testing, then tell me the vote split.
Have three agents debate this architecture choice together.
Write a structured prompt contract with failure conditions.
